content: permit(principal, action == Action::"login", resource == Client::"internal-portal") when { principal has user_type && principal.user_type == "employee" && context.access_route == "internal" };

permit(principal, action == Action::"login", resource == Client::"partner-portal") when { principal has user_type && principal.user_type == "partner" && principal has organization && principal.organization == "globex" };
